home.title: PrepGenius AI
home.subtitle: Personalized Learning & Assessment Platform for Regional Competitive Exams

errors.validation: Please check the information you entered and try again.
errors.authorization: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
errors.conflict: This conflicts with existing data. Please review and try again.
errors.lockout: Your account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.server: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
errors.network: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.name: Full Name
auth.login_subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your personalized learning dashboard
auth.register_subtitle: Start your journey towards cracking regional competitive exams
auth.forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email address and we will send you a reset token
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Enter your reset token and your new password below
auth.verify_email_subtitle: Enter the verification token sent to your email address
auth.email_for_resend: Needed to resend your verification token
auth.success_resend: Verification email resent. Please check your inbox.
auth.success_register: Registration successful! Please check your email for the verification code.
auth.success_verify: Email verified successfully! You can now log in.
auth.success_reset_request: Password reset request sent if the account exists.
auth.success_reset_confirm: Password has been reset successfully. You can now log in.
auth.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.val_phone_invalid: Enter a valid phone number in international format, e.g. +919812345678.
auth.val_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.consent_acknowledgement: I agree to the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and <terms>Terms of Service</terms>.
auth.val_consent_required: You must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms to continue.

onboarding.subtitle: Set up your preparation in three quick steps.
onboarding.exam_help: Choose the exam you are preparing for. You can change this later in settings.
onboarding.date_help: Pick your expected exam date so we can plan your countdown and daily goals.
onboarding.success: Onboarding complete! Your dashboard is ready.
onboarding.val_date_past: Exam date cannot be in the past.
onboarding.no_exams_desc: There are no active exams to choose from right now. Please check back soon.

diagnostic.title: Take your diagnostic assessment
diagnostic.description: Start with a quick diagnostic so we can map your strengths and weak areas and tailor your daily practice.
diagnostic.launch_success: Your diagnostic is ready. Good luck!

diagnostic_complete.subtitle_scored: Here's how you did on your first assessment.
diagnostic_complete.subtitle_pending: This usually takes a few seconds. Refresh to check again.
diagnostic_complete.subtitle_error: Something went wrong fetching your diagnostic results. Please try again.

readiness.title: Exam Readiness
readiness.subtitle: See how prepared you are and what to study next.
readiness.score_unavailable: Your readiness score isn't available yet.
readiness.score_provisional: Complete a diagnostic assessment to unlock your readiness score.
readiness.subjects_empty_desc: Complete an assessment to see how you're doing by subject.
readiness.weak_empty_desc: Great work — nothing needs urgent attention right now.
readiness.reco_subtitle: Suggested next steps from your performance.
readiness.reco_empty_desc: Keep practising — personalised suggestions will appear here.
readiness.error_desc: Something went wrong fetching your analytics. Please try again.
readiness.no_exam_desc: Choose your target exam to start tracking your readiness.

topic_mastery.title: Topic Mastery
topic_mastery.subtitle: Your performance by topic. Sort to find strengths and gaps.
topic_mastery.no_exam_desc: Choose your target exam to start tracking topic mastery.
topic_mastery.error_desc: Something went wrong fetching your data. Please try again.
topic_mastery.empty_desc: Practice questions and your topic mastery will appear here.

trends.title: Trends & Progress
trends.subtitle: Your performance over time, straight from your assessments.
trends.no_exam_desc: Choose your target exam to start tracking your progress.
trends.error_desc: Something went wrong fetching your data. Please try again.
trends.empty_desc: Complete assessments and your progress will appear here.
trends.overall_subtitle: Score and accuracy across your scored assessments.
trends.readiness_subtitle: How your readiness score has changed over time.

history.title: Assessment History & Insights
history.subtitle: Browse your assessments, explore weak topics, and review recent progress.
history.no_exam_desc: Choose your target exam to start tracking your assessments.
history.error_desc: Something went wrong fetching your data. Please try again.
history.history_subtitle: Your scored assessments. Select one for details.
history.history_empty_desc: Complete an assessment and it will appear here.
history.recent_empty_desc: Your recent assessments will appear here.
history.weak_subtitle: Topics to focus on, with suggested actions.
history.weak_empty_desc: Nothing matches this filter right now.
history.detail_error_desc: Something went wrong fetching the details. Please try again.
history.pass_status_pass: You met the pass line for this assessment.
history.subjects_empty_desc: No subject breakdown available for this assessment.
history.topics_empty_desc: No topic breakdown available for this assessment.

dashboard.start_practice_desc: Answer questions customized to your syllabus and target exam.
dashboard.weak_topics_subtitle: Focus areas requiring improvement based on recent performance
dashboard.recommendations_subtitle: Personalized study resources to boost your preparation
dashboard.upcoming_mocks_subtitle: Scheduled exams matching your target syllabus
dashboard.onboarding_subtitle: To generate personal practice sessions, you first need to choose which exam you are preparing for.
dashboard.first_practice_desc: Take your first practice session to generate weak topics analysis and recommendations.
dashboard.positive_reinforcement: Excellent! You don't have any active weak topics. Keep up the high score!
dashboard.greeting_subtitle: Let's keep learning today to crack your exam goal.
dashboard.no_recommendations: No recommendations available yet. Keep practicing to generate insights!
dashboard.revise_topic_desc: Focus on key subtopics and explanations
dashboard.daily_practice_content: PrepGenius AI has picked 10 questions tailored specifically to cover your weak areas and keep your daily streak alive.

results.title: Test Results
results.empty_desc: This test attempt does not have any recorded results or answers.

analytics.title: Performance Analytics
analytics.no_history_desc: Start practicing or take a mock test to see your performance metrics and charts here!

rules_dialog.title: Pre-Launch Rules & Guidelines
rules_dialog.fullscreen_desc: For the best exam experience and to prevent accidental interruptions, we recommend taking this test in full-screen mode.

empty_states.no_exam_desc: Please configure your target exam in profile settings to select practice topics.
empty_states.no_subjects_desc: There are no subjects configured for this exam yet.
empty_states.no_mocks_desc: There are no mock tests published for this exam at this moment.

mixed_practice.title: Mixed Subject Practice
mixed_practice.desc: Practice a randomized set of questions covering all subjects in your syllabus to build exam stamina.

player.review_summary: Review your answer summary before submitting your test.
player.unanswered_warning_singular: {count} question has no answer and will be skipped.
player.unanswered_warning_plural: {count} questions have no answer and will be skipped.
player.processing_subtext: This is taking a moment. Please keep this page open.
player.alert_time_expired: Time's up. Submitting your answers now.
player.alert_time_remaining_1m: 1 minute remaining. Your answers will be submitted automatically.
player.alert_time_remaining_5m: 5 minutes remaining. Please review your answers.
player.load_questions_failed: Failed to load exam questions. Check your connection and try again.
player.save_sync_failed: Could not sync your saved answers. Check your connection and try again.
player.submit_failed: Could not submit your test. Check your connection and try again.
player.aria_exit_test: Exit test and return to dashboard
player.exit_dialog_desc: Are you sure you want to leave this test? Your timer will continue running on the server.
player.offline_banner_text: You are currently offline. Answers are being saved locally and will sync when you reconnect.
player.sr_save_offline_queued: Auto-save: You are offline. Answer queued for sync.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, target exam settings, password security, and data privacy.

profile.title: Personal Details
profile.subtitle: Update your name, contact details, and default language.
profile.phone_invalid: Enter a valid phone number beginning with +.

exam.title: Exam Target
exam.subtitle: Select the exam you are preparing for and your target exam date.
exam.no_exam_selected: No exam selected. Please choose your exam.
exam.exam_help: Choose the exam used for practice, analytics, and recommendations.
exam.date_help: Optional. Update the date used for your exam countdown.
exam.date_past: Exam date cannot be in the past.
exam.empty_desc: There are no active exams to choose from right now.

security.title: Password Security
security.subtitle: Change your login password. Modifying password will sign you out of all other devices.
security.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.

privacy.title: Data Privacy & GDPR
privacy.subtitle: Export your account data or request permanent deletion of your profile under DPDP/GDPR regulations.
privacy.export_desc: Request a complete archive of your profile, attempts, and platform activity.
privacy.export_success: Your data export has been requested.
privacy.delete_desc: Permanently delete your account. This action will anonymize your data and is irreversible.

tutor.title: AI Tutor
tutor.subtitle: Your personal AI study companion for explanations and concept clarity.
tutor.coming_soon_description: We're building an AI tutor that explains answers, clarifies concepts, and adapts to your preferred language. It will be available in an upcoming release.
tutor.history_placeholder: Conversation history will appear here when AI Tutor is available.
tutor.input_placeholder: Ask the AI Tutor a question…
tutor.future_capabilities: What the AI Tutor will do
